---
title: "Binu A"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor | HPC, Edge Systems, and Performance-Aware AI Computing | Technical Consultant"
description-meta: "Assistant Professor | HPC, Edge Systems, and Performance-Aware AI Computing | Technical Consultant"
image: "files/images/profile.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: https://binooa.github.io/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:binu_a@rajagiritech.edu.in
    - icon: globe
      text: IRINS Profile
      href: https://rajagiritech.irins.org/profile/301126
      target: _blank
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Binu A is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Information Technology at Rajagiri School of Engineering and Technology (Autonomous), Kochi. With over 17 years of experience, his work spans engineering education, system design, and applied research in computing systems.

His technical focus includes High Performance Computing, distributed and parallel systems, cloud and edge computing, and performance-oriented computing for AI workloads. His research and ongoing doctoral work address microarchitecture-aware performance analysis and optimization of inference workloads on CPU-based edge systems, with emphasis on computation–memory interaction and system-level efficiency.

He leads academic and technical initiatives related to computing infrastructure, including High Performance Computing and cloud-based environments, supporting both research and large-scale data processing needs. His teaching covers core areas such as distributed computing, high performance computing, and multi-core architectures, along with contributions to curriculum design, academic auditing, and accreditation processes.

Beyond academia, he has contributed as a technical consultant and systems architect for multiple government and autonomous bodies, working on e-Governance platforms, digital archival systems, learning management systems, and institutional software solutions. His engagements involve system design, validation, migration, and deployment of large-scale digital infrastructure across public sector organisations.

His professional recognitions include selection as Mentor of Change under NITI Aayog and IEEE STEM Ambassador (Region 10), along with roles in academic review, policy discussions, and national-level technical initiatives. His work integrates research, implementation, and advisory roles, focusing on practical and scalable computing solutions.

---

## Current Roles

- Assistant Professor, Department of Information Technology, RSET  
- Faculty In-Charge, Systems & Distributed Computing Research Group  
- Faculty In-Charge, Sunya Lab – High Performance Computing Lab  
- Technical Consultant – Software Systems, Cloud Platforms, AI/ML, Digital Infrastructure  

---

## Academic Background

- PhD in Computer Science (Pursuing), CUSAT  
- M.Tech in Software Engineering, CUSAT  
- B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, CUSAT  

---

## Areas of Expertise

- High Performance Computing  
- Distributed and Parallel Computing  
- Cloud Computing and Virtualization  
- Edge Computing Systems  
- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning  
- System Performance Tuning  
- Full Stack Software Development  
- Learning Management Systems and Digital Archival Platforms  
- Networking and IT Infrastructure  

---

## Teaching and Academic Contributions

I have extensive teaching and mentoring experience at UG and PG levels in areas such as:

- Distributed Computing  
- Distributed Algorithms  
- High Performance Computing  
- Multi-Core Architecture and Programming  

I have also contributed to:
- Curriculum development and syllabus revision  
- Accreditation processes (NBA, NAAC, Autonomous)  
- Academic administration and departmental leadership  

---

## Research, Labs, and Technical Leadership

I lead and support research initiatives in HPC and cloud-based systems, including:

- Establishment and management of HPC infrastructure  
- Cluster deployment and maintenance  
- GPU computing and performance optimization  
- OpenStack-based cloud environments  
- Compiler optimizations and system-level tuning  

Sunya Lab at RSET supports:
- HPC computing  
- Cloud computing  
- Applied research and innovation  

---

## Consultancy and Professional Engagements

I have worked as consultant, architect, and technical advisor for multiple institutions and government-affiliated bodies, including:

- Guruvayur Devaswom Board  
- Kerala Public Service Commission  
- Kerala High Court  
- Kochi City Police Commissionerate  
- Bar Council of Kerala  
- ICFOSS (Govt. of Kerala)  
- Cochin University of Science and Technology  
- Various academic institutions and professional bodies  

Areas of contribution include:
- e-Governance platforms  
- Learning Management Systems  
- Digital archiving systems  
- Cloud deployment and IT infrastructure  
- Online examination and publication systems  

---

## Recognitions and Professional Service

- Mentor of Change – NITI Aayog, Govt. of India  
- IEEE STEM Ambassador (Region 10, Asia Pacific)  
- Reviewer – IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems  
- Academic Auditor – APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University  
- Subject Expert – Multiple universities and academic bodies  
- Keynote Speaker – IEEE and academic conferences  

---

## Funded Projects and Applied Work

I have contributed to multiple funded and applied projects in areas such as:

- Traffic Data Analytics (Kochi Metro / KMTA)  
- AI-based Video Surveillance Systems  
- Academic Document Archival Systems  
- Cloud and Data Analytics Platforms  
- Healthcare and Monitoring Systems  
- Edge-based intelligent computing systems  

Roles include:
- Principal Investigator (PI)  
- Co-Principal Investigator (Co-PI)  
- Architect / Advisor / Developer  

---

## Workshops, Conferences, and Outreach

I have conducted and contributed to workshops on:

- Software Defined Networking  
- Private Cloud Deployment  
- Big Data Platforms  
- GPU and CUDA Programming  
- Internet of Things  
- Learning Management Systems  
- Android Programming  

Also served as:
- Program Chair  
- Event Chair  
- Organising Committee Member  
- IEEE and ACM event contributor  

---

## Publications, Books, and Patents

My academic work includes:

- IEEE and international conference publications  
- Research in cloud computing, distributed systems, and analytics  
- Books on programming and problem solving  
- Patents in:
  - AI-based surveillance systems  
  - Intelligent monitoring systems  
  - Edge computing performance systems  

---

## Certifications and Technical Training

- IBM AIX Administration  
- IBM Rational Software Architect  
- CUDA Programming (IISc Bangalore)  
- DSpace and Digital Library Systems  
- Requirement Engineering and UML  
- Software Development for Portable Devices  

---

:::
